title: Why “tsarukyan vs covington raf 11” is trending in US: 500+ searches, the facts (July 18, 2026)
description: “tsarukyan vs covington raf 11” is trending in US with 500+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from MMA Fighting and 2 more.

sources.title: Wrestling event coming to Milwaukee and it'll be Ben Askren's comeback
RAF 11 live results, round-by-round updates for Arman Tsarukyan vs. Colby Covington wrestling card

sections.heading: What is trending: “tsarukyan vs covington raf 11”
paragraphs: “tsarukyan vs covington raf 11” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for US (snapshot taken 2026-07-18T09:08:38+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 500 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from MMA Fighting, Milwaukee Journal Sentinel, Yahoo Sports. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “Wrestling event coming to Milwaukee and it'll be Ben Askren's comeback” — Milwaukee Journal Sentinel
“RAF 11 live results, round-by-round updates for Arman Tsarukyan vs. Colby Covington wrestling card” — Yahoo Sports
“RAF 11 Results: Tsarukyan vs. Covington” — MMA Fighting

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sat, 18 Jul 2026 00:30:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-18T09:08:38+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-18T09:08:54+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

faq.q: Why is “tsarukyan vs covington raf 11” trending?
faq.a: Google's Trending Now feed links the spike to coverage from MMA Fighting, Milwaukee Journal Sentinel, Yahoo Sports. The associated headlines are: “Wrestling event coming to Milwaukee and it'll be Ben Askren's comeback” (Milwaukee Journal Sentinel); “RAF 11 live results, round-by-round updates for Arman Tsarukyan vs. Colby Covington wrestling card” (Yahoo Sports); “RAF 11 Results: Tsarukyan vs. Covington” (MMA Fighting).

faq.q: How many people searched for “tsarukyan vs covington raf 11”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 500 searches in US as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.

faq.q: Where is “tsarukyan vs covington raf 11” trending?
faq.a: This snapshot covers US. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
